originalTitle: Live RL dev on Pufferlib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Data Races in PufferLib's C Vectorization Backend
summary: Debugged data races and hangs in the new C vectorization backend for PufferLib, which uses double-buffered CUDA transfers to reduce CPU-GPU overhead. Fixed race conditions using atomic operations and thread sanitizer, and merged pull requests for hyperparameter sweeps and tower climb environment.
